name: AccuLynx Roofing Contractor Management API
what_it_does: AccuLynx roofing and exterior contractor management REST API for lead management, job tracking, insurance supplement management, material ordering, and financial reporting. Enables AI agents to manage lead capture and prospect tracking for automated roofing sales pipeline, handle job setup and project management for roofing project lifecycle automation, access insurance claim adjuster supplement management for insurance restoration workflow automation, retrieve material ordering and supplier integration for automated roofing material procurement, manage crew scheduling and subcontractor assignment for field operations automation, handle photo and inspection documentation for jobsite documentation automation, access production tracking and milestone management for roofing project progress automation, retrieve invoicing and payment management for roofing contractor billing automation, manage customer communication and portal access for client relationship automation, and integrate AccuLynx with EagleView (aerial measurement), GAF, Owens Corning supplier portals, and accounting systems.
use_cases: Managing roofing leads from sales pipeline agents
Processing insurance claims from restoration agents
Ordering materials from procurement automation agents
Scheduling crews from field operations agents
not_for: General construction project management (use Procore or Autodesk Build)
Large commercial roofing without residential/insurance focus
HVAC, plumbing, or non-exterior contractor trades
best_when: A residential or commercial roofing contractor, exterior contractor, or insurance restoration company wanting AI agents to automate lead tracking, job management, insurance supplement documentation, material ordering, and crew scheduling within AccuLynx.
avoid_when: INSURANCE SUPPLEMENT ACCURACY AND ADJUSTER REVIEW: Automated insurance supplement requests generated via AccuLynx must accurately reflect actual damage and scope of work; automated supplement inflation without physical inspection basis creates insurance fraud exposure and contractor license risk. MATERIAL ORDERING COMMITMENT WITHOUT JOB CONFIRMATION: Automated material order placement from AccuLynx triggered by estimate acceptance must be gated to signed contract and deposit receipt; automated material commitment before contract execution creates financial exposure for cancelled jobs. CREW CERTIFICATION AND SAFETY COMPLIANCE FOR ASSIGNMENT: Automated crew scheduling via AccuLynx must verify crew member fall protection certification and OSHA 10/30 completion before assignment to multi-story roofing; automated assignment of uncertified workers to height work creates OSHA and workers' compensation liability. Customer deposit handling and state contractor law — automated customer deposit collection through AccuLynx must comply with state contractor licensing law deposit limits (some states cap deposits at 10-30% of contract); automated deposit collection above legal cap creates contractor license violation.

auth.notes: AccuLynx uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Beloit, Wisconsin HQ. Founded 2009. Private (PE-backed). Roofing and exterior contractor CRM and job management platform. Insurance restoration, residential and commercial roofing focus. EagleView aerial measurement integration, supplier portal integrations (GAF, Owens Corning). Competes with JobNimbus, RoofSnap, and Improveit 360 for roofing contractor management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user monthly or annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user monthly or annual subscription with tiered feature sets
pricing.notes: Beloit WI. Private PE-backed. Founded 2009. Roofing contractor focus. Insurance restoration and residential/commercial. Per-user subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; job and lead API calls throttled per subscription tier

known_agent_gotchas: INSURANCE SUPPLEMENT AUTOMATION FRAUD RISK: Automated insurance supplement requests generated via AccuLynx must be based on actual documented damage; automated supplement line item inflation without physical inspection basis creates insurance fraud exposure under state criminal fraud statutes and contractor license revocation risk

MATERIAL ORDER COMMITMENT BEFORE SIGNED CONTRACT: Automated material ordering triggered by AccuLynx estimate acceptance must require signed contract and deposit before order placement; automated material commitment for converted leads without contract creates financial exposure for high-ticket roofing material orders on cancelled jobs

CREW SAFETY CERTIFICATION VERIFICATION FOR HEIGHT WORK: Automated crew scheduling via AccuLynx for multi-story or steep-slope roofing must verify current fall protection training and OSHA certification; automated assignment of uncertified workers to height work creates OSHA 1926.502 violation and employer workers' compensation liability

EagleView aerial measurement integration accuracy — automated AccuLynx job creation from EagleView aerial measurement must validate measurement accuracy for complex roof geometries; EagleView automated measurements for multi-slope or obstructed roofs can have 5-15% area variance; supplement automated measurement with physical verification for high-value bids

State contractor deposit law compliance — automated customer deposit collection through AccuLynx payment processing must check state contractor licensing law deposit limits; states including California, Florida, and New York have deposit caps (10-33%); automated deposit collection above state limit creates contractor license violation

Webhook deduplication for job status events — AccuLynx job status change webhooks may fire multiple times for rapid status transitions; implement AccuLynx job ID + status deduplication to prevent duplicate material orders or crew dispatches from redundant webhook events
agent_readiness.security_notes: Roofing contractor management. SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US. Job, customer, and insurance claim data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Roofing contractor management. SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US. Job and customer data.
